description: Shared small-model profile registry for cli-opencode dispatch. Each model declares one or more executor paths with their provider + quota_pool, so the fallback engine can route across pools when one is exhausted. Active small-model rotation: DeepSeek-v4-pro, Kimi-k2.7-code (Kimi For Coding plan via provider `kimi-for-coding`), MiniMax-M3 (default via the MiniMax Token Plan provider `minimax-coding-plan`; pay-per-token Direct API via provider `minimax`), MiMo-V2.5-Pro (via the Xiaomi Token Plan Europe provider `xiaomi-token-plan-ams` or Xiaomi Direct API provider `xiaomi`; free opencode/mimo-v2.5-free sibling). Optional unverified separate-pool stub: Claude Haiku.

executors.notes: Direct DeepSeek API key (`DEEPSEEK_API_KEY`). Requires `--pure` flag; rejects tool names with `:`.
Through opencode-go provider credits (workspace-wide pool; 401 Insufficient balance when exhausted).

strengths: complex reasoning
root-cause debugging
multi-step implementation
architecture trade-off analysis
weaknesses: visual/illustration tasks: richest individual drawings but gold-heavy and brand-blue-starved despite a brand brief (informal bento bake-off, n=1 fixture, 2026-06-22; see references/models/deepseek-v4-pro.md)

executors.notes: Kimi For Coding plan (subscription) via opencode provider `kimi-for-coding`. Live slug `kimi-for-coding/k2p7` (display name 'Kimi K2.7 Code'); confirmed via `opencode models kimi-for-coding` 2026-06-15 → k2p5/k2p6/k2p7/kimi-k2-thinking, all 262,144-token context / 32,768 output. Coding-optimized Kimi K2.7; dispatch cost 0 (subscription). Omit `--agent` at top level (opencode rejects named agents there). `--variant high` is accepted (exit 0, smoke-tested 2026-06-15) though its effect is benchmark-unverified. Re-verify the live slug before dispatch — Kimi/Moonshot ids drift; do NOT use the invented `kimi-token-plan-ams` slug.

capability.notes: Live slug `kimi-for-coding/k2p7` confirmed responsive 2026-06-15 (`opencode models kimi-for-coding`; smoke dispatch returned 'pong', cost 0). agent_policy omit-general: do not pass `--agent` at the top level. format_mode json: dispatch via `opencode run --format json` for the normalized token/cost/latency envelope. default_variant high + variant_status accepted-unverified: `--variant high` is accepted without error but its reasoning-effort effect is not benchmark-confirmed for this provider — safe to pass, do not depend on it. Subscription billing: dispatch cost shows 0. Re-verify slug before dispatch (Kimi/Moonshot ids drift).

strengths: dedicated Kimi For Coding subscription pool (`kimi-for-coding`), independent of opencode-go / minimax / xiaomi pools
coding-optimized Kimi K2.7 (display name 'Kimi K2.7 Code')
256k (262,144-token) context for long-file and multi-file work
subscription billing — dispatch cost 0 (no pay-per-token burn)

visual/illustration tasks: strongest brand restraint of the rotation — blue-led, orange reserved for one alert, gold rare, cohesive set mapping to feature facets (informal bento bake-off, n=1 fixture, 2026-06-22; see references/models/kimi-k2.7-code.md)
weaknesses: single executor path (no fallback if the kimi-for-coding pool is exhausted)
weaker framings (rcaf/cidi) occasionally miss adversarial edge cases on strict validators (benchmark 007) - use costar/race/tidd-ec
--variant effect unverified (flag accepted, reasoning-effort impact not benchmark-confirmed)

at --variant high on broad/large-repo scopes, over-explores (many sequential reads) and can exceed a 600s dispatch timeout WITHOUT emitting (opencode flushes only the final message -> 0 bytes; looks like a hang but is working); mitigate with a hard read-cap in the prompt + 1200s+ timeout, or omit --variant (observed 2026-06-17, n=few)

evidence.sample: 5-framework bakeoff on invalid-dominant STRICT VALIDATORS (validate-ipv4 + validate-date + validate-semver), 6 samples/cell, throttled serial real kimi-for-coding/k2p7 dispatches. (The 4th fixture hard-roman-to-int was excluded - its run stalled under orchestration churn; the 3-fixture result is conclusive.) Unlike the saturated run 006, correctness SEPARATED here. Per-framework correctness (n=18): tidd-ec 1.0 = race 1.0 = costar 1.0 (perfect tier) > cidi 0.996 > rcaf 0.992. Trust verdict: TIE on correctness (the 3 perfect frameworks cannot be statistically separated, top-pair margin 0, 90% CI [0,0]). The actionable signal: rcaf (the former convention default) is objectively the WEAKEST - it produced strict-validator code that missed adversarial cases - so it is retired/avoided for this model. Among the perfect tier, costar is primary for cross-evidence robustness (also MiMo's empirical winner, benchmark 004; favored by run 006's judge); tidd-ec is the most token-efficient (25 vs costar 70 median words) and is the fallback. This objectively refutes run 006's subjective gpt-5.5 judge, which had wrongly ranked rcaf/race highest.

executors.notes: Default MiniMax path. MiniMax Token Plan (subscription) via opencode provider `minimax-coding-plan`; Anthropic-compatible endpoint `https://api.minimax.io/anthropic/v1` (China: api.minimaxi.com). Live slug `minimax-coding-plan/MiniMax-M3` (plain); on opencode 1.16.2 `opencode models minimax-coding-plan` lists M2/M2.1/M2.5/M2.5-highspeed/M2.7/M2.7-highspeed/M3 — there is NO `MiniMax-M3-highspeed` (verified 2026-06-06). Omit `--agent` (rejected on opencode 1.15.13). Best prompt framework: TIDD-EC + dense pre-planning (benchmark 003). --variant omitted by default.
Pay-per-token Direct API. Confirm the live id with `opencode models minimax` before dispatch. Omit `--agent`.

capability.notes: Plain `minimax-coding-plan/MiniMax-M3` confirmed live (2026-06-02; re-verified on opencode 1.16.2 2026-06-06); there is NO `MiniMax-M3-highspeed` on 1.16.2. agent_policy omit-general: `--agent` is rejected on opencode 1.15.13. format_mode json: dispatch via `opencode run --format json` for the normalized token/cost/latency envelope. default_variant high is the dispatch-layer default; `--variant` forwarding for this provider was historically omitted (unverified) — confirm acceptance before relying on a non-default variant. Direct API path: provider `minimax`, quota_pool `minimax-api`.

strengths: subscription billing (no pay-per-token burn) via the MiniMax Token Plan
separate quota pool (minimax-token-plan) independent of cognition/opencode-go
responds well to guardrail-heavy framing (TIDD-EC) + dense pre-planning
Direct API alternative available via provider `minimax` (pay-per-token)
weaknesses: no MiniMax-M3-highspeed slug on opencode 1.16.2 (verified 2026-06-06) — dispatch plain MiniMax-M3
subscription request budget resets on a 5-hour rolling window

evidence.sample: 7-fixture rig, real MiniMax dispatches (benchmark run on M2.7; contract carried to M3)

executors.notes: Xiaomi Token Plan (Europe) via opencode provider xiaomi-token-plan-ams (credential 'Xiaomi Token Plan (Europe)'). Live slug xiaomi-token-plan-ams/mimo-v2.5-pro (confirmed responsive on opencode 1.15.13, 2026-06-01); verify the full live list with 'opencode models xiaomi-token-plan-ams'. Omit --agent (warns + falls back on 1.15.13). Free cheap-iteration path: opencode/mimo-v2.5-free (opencode-go gateway, v2.5 tier). Context window 1,000,000 tokens (released 2026-04-22). OpenAI-compatible endpoint https://token-plan-ams.xiaomimimo.com/v1; opencode cost shows 0/0 (Token-Plan subscription). --variant maps to MiMo reasoning effort (low/medium/high) in opencode settings — always dispatch with --variant high (confirmed accepted on opencode 1.15.13). Best prompt framework (benchmark 004, 10/10 real runs): COSTAR or RACE + lean pre-planning — frame for format/brevity, not guardrails; TIDD-EC/dense ranked last; avoid CIDI (intermittent tool-only file-writes).

capability.notes: Live slug `xiaomi-token-plan-ams/mimo-v2.5-pro` confirmed responsive on opencode 1.15.13 (2026-06-01). default_variant high: `--variant` maps to MiMo reasoning effort (low/medium/high) and `--variant high` is confirmed accepted — always dispatch with it. agent_policy omit-general: `--agent` warns and falls back on 1.15.13. format_mode json: OpenAI-compatible endpoint; dispatch via `opencode run --format json` for the normalized envelope. Free cheap-iteration sibling `opencode/mimo-v2.5-free` (opencode-go gateway) is a separate path not covered by this capability default.

strengths: 1,000,000-token context window (largest in the small-model rotation)
strongly agentic — sustains 1000+ sequential tool calls (SWE-bench Pro 57.2)
token-efficient — 40-60% fewer tokens/trajectory vs frontier models (Opus 4.6 / GPT-5.4)
Xiaomi Token Plan (Europe) subscription billing via provider xiaomi-token-plan-ams
separate quota pool (xiaomi-token-plan) independent of opencode-go / minimax / cognition pools
free cheap-iteration sibling available at opencode/mimo-v2.5-free
weaknesses: long-context quality degrades past ~512k despite the 1M window
prompt-framework benchmark 004 used 2 fixtures / single-sample — COSTAR vs RACE tie is within noise

visual/illustration tasks: over-accents — spreads orange/gold across most cards, weak color restraint despite clean shapes and a reserved-accent brief (informal bento bake-off, n=1 fixture, 2026-06-22; see references/models/mimo-v2.5-pro.md)

executors.notes: Future small-model fallback candidate. Adoption blocked until quota-pool semantics verified.

strengths: separate quota pool
fast natural-language synthesis
future fallback candidate
